# CBAMValid — LLM & AI Agent Sitemap
> Academic Oversight: Prof. Dr. Neela Nataraj (IIT Bombay). 
> Methodologies validated against EU Regulation 2023/956 and ISO 14064-1.

> CBAMValid is an independent software service that assists non-EU exporters and EU importers in preparing verification-ready Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) dossiers. The platform automatically verifies data compliance, links primary document evidence, and generates locked exporter declarations.

## CBAM Calculation Methodology & Data Sources
CBAMValid adheres strictly to Regulation (EU) 2023/956 and Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2023/1773. The calculation engine runs server-side with deterministic, reproducible, versioned formulas.

### Embedded Emissions Databases
- **Default Emission Factors**: Sourced directly from the European Commission CBAM Transitional Registry — Regulation (EU) 2023/956 Annex I + Implementing Regulation (EU) 2023/1773 Annex III.
- **Precursor Mapping**: Aligned with ISO 14064-1 and GHG Protocol Scope 3 Category 1 boundaries. Full precursor tracking is mandatory for complex goods under iron/steel, aluminium, and downstream sectors.
- **Grid Emission Factors**: EU default grid factor 0.45 tCO2e/MWh per Regulation (EU) 2023/956 Annex I, Section 3. Country-specific certified factors accepted.

### Calculation Engine Capabilities
- **Direct Emissions Calculator**: Computes Scope 1 emissions per source stream: E_direct = Σ(AD_i × EF_i), where AD_i is activity data and EF_i is the corresponding emission factor. Includes calcination CO2 for cement, process N2O for fertilisers, and combustion emissions for all sectors.
- **Indirect Emissions Calculator**: E_indirect = AD_elec × EF_grid. Electricity consumed in raw material preparation, production, rolling, grinding, and finishing processes is fully in scope.
- **Specific Embedded Emissions per Good**: SE_good = (E_direct × AllocationShare + E_indirect × AllocationShare) / ProductionVolume. Allocation shares must sum to exactly 1.00 across all manufactured outputs.
- **CN Code Validator**: Cross-references 8-digit Combined Nomenclature codes against the official CBAM Annex I scope registry in real-time.

## Core Software & Tools
- [CBAM Exporter Software](https://cbamvalid.com/product/): Configure manufacturing installations, map system boundaries, track source streams, and link evidence files.
- [Pricing Packages](https://cbamvalid.com/pricing/): Purchase credits to unlock the 23-component verification readiness package and generate sealed dossier releases.
- [CBAM Certificate Verification](https://cbamvalid.com/verify/): Cryptographically verify the integrity, release status, and ledger logs of generated dossiers.
- [CBAM CN-Code Scope Hub](https://cbamvalid.com/cn-codes/): Complete index of CBAM-covered Combined Nomenclature (CN) codes, benchmarks, and regulation linkages.

## CBAM Sector Compliance Guides
- [Sector Guides Index](https://cbamvalid.com/sectors/): Guide list covering system boundaries and precursor rules for all CBAM sectors.
- [Cement Sector Guide](https://cbamvalid.com/sectors/cement/): Clinker calcination, raw meal, blending rules, and benchmarks.
- [Iron and Steel Guide](https://cbamvalid.com/sectors/steel/): BF-BOF and EAF routes, precursor tracking, and rolling emissions.
- [Aluminium Sector Guide](https://cbamvalid.com/sectors/aluminium/): Smelting electricity factors, anode baking, and foils.
- [Fertilisers Sector Guide](https://cbamvalid.com/sectors/fertilisers/): Nitric acid oxidation, ammonia reforming, and N2O tracking.
- [Hydrogen Sector Guide](https://cbamvalid.com/sectors/hydrogen/): Reforming pathways, electrolysis source tracking, and CCS rules.
- [Electricity Sector Guide](https://cbamvalid.com/sectors/electricity/): Grid factors, direct emissions importing, and certification.
- [Downstream Complex Goods Guide](https://cbamvalid.com/sectors/downstream/): Fabrications and precursor accumulation standards.

## Methodologies & Guides
- [CBAM Calculation Methodology](https://cbamvalid.com/methodology/): Formulas and data structures for calculating direct and indirect embedded emissions under EU regulations.
- [CBAM Workflow Guide](https://cbamvalid.com/how-it-works/): Detailed step-by-step walk-through of the dossier preparation process from initial setup to sealing.
- [Sample Compliance Dossier](https://cbamvalid.com/sample-dossier/): Interactive viewer showcasing a complete fictional operator preparation dossier.

## About & Legal Information
- [About CBAMValid](https://cbamvalid.com/about/): Background, academic oversight, advisory board members, and service mission.
- [Contact Support](https://cbamvalid.com/contact/): Submit billing, API, or general support tickets to info@cbamvalid.com.
- [Terms of Service](https://cbamvalid.com/terms/): Legal terms, credit entitlement contract, and platform usage limits.
- [Privacy Notice](https://cbamvalid.com/privacy/): Security policy, data isolation, and encryption protocols for evidence storage.
- [Refund Policy](https://cbamvalid.com/refund-policy/): Transaction refund rules and credit ledger terms.
- [Cookie Policy](https://cbamvalid.com/cookie-policy/): Usage of authentication session cookies and site preferences.
- [Legal Notice](https://cbamvalid.com/legal-notice/): Corporate operator details and tax IDs.

## AI & Developer Resources
- [Full LLM Knowledge base](https://cbamvalid.com/llms-full.txt): Absolute full text, formulas, and schema contracts of the platform for AI engines.
- [Sitemap.xml](https://cbamvalid.com/sitemap.xml): Dynamic XML index containing lastmod timestamps and crawl frequencies.
